first ways that you can say that you're
busy in English is to say I have a lot
to do so maybe a friend of yours asks if
you can come over uh and help him with a

think I'm going to be able to because I
have a lot to do tonight so you don't
have to say what you have to do but you
just say I have a lot to do so a second
way to say that you're busy in English
is to say I have a lot on my plate so
you know what a plate is when you sit
down to eat food you put the food on
your plate um so when you say to someone
I have a lot on my plate it means the
same thing as saying that you're busy so
maybe your boss wants you to do an extra
job at work and he says um here's this
extra job I need you to do you could say
I don't think I'm going to have time I'm
busy I already have a lot on my plate
and hopefully he recognizes that and
doesn't give you extra work but when you
say I have a lot on my plate it's
another way to say I'm busy a third way
to say that you're busy is to say I have
a lot on the go um so let's say you're
looking at your week and you're trying
to figure out a time when you can meet
your sister to go see a movie or to go
out for dinner uh and you could say to
your sister I'm not sure I can fit this
in because I have a lot on the go uh
which would mean that you already have a

you just have so many things on the go
you're not sure you can create uh some

and you're trying to figure out if you

because you have a lot going on that day
you have too many things to do uh to be

going on so a fifth way
uh to communicate to someone that you're
busy is to say I'm swamped uh this is a

you feel like um there's just too many
